Variante
A/B testing from Figma — no dev needed
Pick any element on your live site and let the flow guide the rest.
Turn a Figma concept into a polished Variant B with AI in a few taps.
Ship it and watch the uplift without touching your codebase.
Connect your account
Paste the API token from your dashboard.

One snippet — every page

      
Add it once in the <head> of every page. Selector and goal load from the server automatically.

    


    
    
    
Ready-made prompt — paste into Cursor, Copilot, ChatGPT or Claude. The AI adds the snippet to your site's <head>. Site: —.
